if u just started u can literally solo lv20 stage with tentacles

you can swap to shield every turn
its free shield

yes
all the realms except chaos have an activated ability

you have very limited options
I think beside the wheels, Clementine is a huge game changer for her as well, as her Strikes are hitting 3 times, making the STR stacks 3 times more valuable
put a lv50 character each wave and do alert 1
and use a support for wave 5
this is the best u can do until u level more units and improve your roster

Over-Exalt, a bonus you get to exalt when you got 8 copies of the character (E3 +4 copies)

if he asked for only beginner teams i wouldnt respond cuz i dont know any
You are dismissing the existence of beginner teams far too fast. He's not asking something clearing madness
Looking for opinions on teams people would build off these or invest in
"beginner team" is just your 3 best standard units and a limited carry
Beginner team, for me, would be something, at core made of available units that easy to reuse later
im litearlly just answering what he asked, if he wanted only beginner teams he shouldve said that 😭
are you just disregarding the 2nd half of that statement

he is not asking for beginner teams ONLY, he asked for both

yeah, many people get attached to their first strong unit... that's not new.
This is currently a weakness of many gatcha games, that lose players with a strong affect, when they see their favorite slowly fall in the abyss due to powercreep
Like, I've played Genshin, and one day, I saw my favorite couldn't do the content anymore
I just stopped playing
The gatcha model suffer of a pitfall that is the lack of character evolution past their basic leveling
I'm pretty sure many people would pull on a banner that modify a character's power to put it back in line with the new meta
wym that already exists
its called pulling dupes....
That's not what I mean
u mean u pull to increase the power to put in line with the new unit?
thats pulling dupes
No
ig it caps out at the dupe cap lol
small difference ‼️
If an unit was released 2 years ago and got powercreep, it's +12 will still be weaker than the newest unit +12
Even if you raise the to +20
well obv
Some mechanics are just obsoletes
but u were talking abt smthing similar
No
to higher dupe old unit vs low dupe new unit
is what i understood from that statement
And please to not tell me what I'm talking about, that's weird. I think I am the one to know what I'm trying to talk about the most :)
Or else, I'd need to go to a sanatorium

u said u pull on something to increase power in line with the new unit
this mean u already invested on the old unit already so it implies that its more invested old unit vs less invested new unit
I do not mean increasing stats
I do not mean dups
wtf do u mean then
I mean like pulling a crystal that would change.... for exemple, how Tinct's Strike work
with pulls?
yes. Do not try to compare it to a currently existing mechanic, no gatcha ever did something like that
so AA?
it changes the kit
What's AA...
the extra talent u get at +12
You still think to dupes obessively, forget about dupes
whats the difference between that system and AA?
u both pull to change the characters kit

Imagine more a special item slot on a character, and you can pull that item like a wheel. Slotting that item modifies the kit of the character in some ways, not forcing you to already have a +12 and not forcing you to accept the new kit
You could put that item on a E1 as much as a +12
And it'll make the kit evolves into a kind of "version 2"
this just sounds like toggleable dupes...
If you just make it extra dupes, it fails the objective, as except whales, no one will ever see the new kits
isnt that the same thing here?
no
u need to invest a lot of pulls to get it
what if they make pulling that thing cost as much as a +12
Because you can slot that item on a E0, that's not a whale thing
yeah but it could costs as much pulls as +12
no
I never said you need +12 to get the item, you do
heyoo <@399824999810072580> , who do you think is the best dps to OE
no i mean for that item they could just make it cost 10k silver per pull
and it would be the same
And that's your addition to my idea, not what I'm saying
im just saying its a possibility
pollsux
I mean a character upgrade, and you add "... for whales" to it
every character upgrade is "for whales" to some extent

Level arachne cuz she just instakill many mobs early. Depending on what chapter your are she should work as your 'dmg dealer' and you can pair her with caro such as salvador for the heals. When you get to higher chaps I recommend ghelot (but she needs E3 and wants thais) as dps (I'm bias to her)
what if the buffs suck until +12
It's not a buff
It's a mechanic change
what if the kit change sucks until +12 then
same thing
Listen, you keep adding things to my idea that are not supposed to be in it
im not adding anything im just providing hypothethicals
im not saying it will
im saying it might
cuz to me this just sounds like what u want is AA but not expensive
a cheap version of AA
.... sighs... sure, when you make a car, the man who design a car could have make it suck one ton of oil per miles... it is possible. It's just not the itent of the base idea.
I'm not discussing the fact people can have terrible design idea, they can
I'm saying that in gatcha, old characters are almost never upgraded
Resulting a mourning in people with strong affect for them
im just saying what ur describing is very similar to just dupes that provide a mechanic change <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
Whatever, if you want
lol ok

I don't care, I just say gatchas, for me, lack a way to "refresh" the powerlevel of old characters.
Just patching them doesn't work, because it doesn't earn money, so the devs will never put a lot of effort in it, unless the character is the current "new release".
So the only way to make that durable, is to make the "patch" tied to something you pull, paying the devs for the time they spend on the update.

You want it to be dupes or something similar at all costs. There are a hundred of other ways to do that, I'll say...
But "how" to make it happen isn't what I'm discussing. I'm just pointing out the lack of existence of that thing as detrimental to player retention.

If someone is currently completely, absolutely in love with Mouchette, when this character will be seen as B-rank, that is only a matter of time, they'll probably just stop playing

if u only like the character, it easy for the dev to release an alternatte version 
if u like the kit, it easy for the dev to release a new unit with a similar kit
if u like both, that is where the issue arises
An alternate version isn't the character you love. It's not because "it's another dimension version of X" that you see it as X.
for this game i guess
but there are other games where the alternate version is literally the same character
also they can do it here too if they really wanted

You can only say it's the same character if it gets the gameplay and personality, but this is also detrimental to force someone to redo ALL the pulls just to see their character keep working in the latest content
oh i mean character like
the actual character
seperated from the kit
like mouchette as a character
not mouchette the kit
that why i seperated the two

Gdoll doesn't work as Doll, so someone loving Doll probably won't be satisfied because you pull a character with some similar point on the visual, a completly different gameplay, another personnality, and slap her name on it
for this game yeah for other games the alters have the same personality and design
they can also make alters here with same personality and design if they wanted
Anyway... do you get my point that some people work on affect and might leave when their favorite is powercrept?
yeah i get that
Do you get my point that if it doesn't earn dev money, they won't do much effort into fixing that?
thats literally every live service game
💀 also i just said they can fix it by releasing alters
like what h*r is doing

USE THE CODE
YouSavedMorimens

wb the other two
Helot is godawful in most cases. She is reduced to a "press exalt and sit there" status for Strike units
Mouchette, Ghelot, Lotan

Uvhash. In honest to god one of the MEH units in the game, neither bad nor good. BUT if you can get him to +12 (basically max dupes) he has the potential for infinite damage....... But I still don't recommend him unless you like him
Too much investment for meh returns
